# Screenshots Directory

This directory stores visual evidence of test automation execution and application functionality.

## Expected Files (Generated by Playwright)
- `login-success.png`
- `login-fail.png`
- `task-created.png`
- `task-updated.png`
- `task-deleted.png`
- `search-exact.png`
- `filter-status.png`
- `validation-missing-title.png`

*Note: Run `npx playwright test` to automatically populate this directory with artifacts based on the `takeScreenshot` calls in the BasePage.*
